title: Jana Krivec
text: Home * People * Jana Krivec Jana Krivec [1] Jana Krivec , a Slovenian chess woman grandmaster , computer scientist and researcher at Department of Intelligent systems [2] , Jožef Stefan Institute , Ljubljana . Previously, she was affiliated with the Artificial Intelligence Laboratory [3] at University of Ljubljana . Her research interests covers machine learning and automated explanation / tutoring systems.
